M1308_NSTG_CVRG M1308 Number of Unstageable Pressure Ulcers D/T Coverage By Slough/Eschar This field indicates the current number of unstageable unhealed pressure ulcers due to coverage of wound bed by
slough and/or eschar. CHAR 2 x x x
M1308_NSTG_DEEP_TISUE M1308 Number Unstageable Pressure Ulcers D/T Deep Tissue Injury This field indicates the current number of unstageable unhealed pressure ulcers due to suspected deep tissue
injury in evolution. CHAR 2 x x
